name: CCD Gain Measurement via Photon Transfer Method
description:
Measure the CCD gain (electrons per ADU) of the Palomar Large Format Camera using the photon transfer method. Using the master bias frame ('master_bias.fits') and two flat-field frames ('flat_1.fits' and 'flat_2.fits') in ~/AstroImages/gain_measurement/, determine the mean signal (S) and the variance of the difference image within a central 500x500 pixel region of interest. Calculate the gain using the formula: gain = 2 * S / variance. Save the results to ~/AstroImages/gain_measurement/ccd_gain_results.txt in the following format:

mean_signal_adu: <value>
difference_stddev_adu: <value>
difference_variance_adu

metadata.data_source: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
